MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 950 Pine Street Partners LLC is present. Represented by Donal McSweeney.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Christopher Minchew is present.
Attorney Elizabeth F. Thomas representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of SEP-10-2012 is vacated.
